sentences.target: Il intimide souvent les nouveaux au club.
sentences.reading: /il ɛ̃timid suvɑ̃ le nuvo o klœb/

translations.fr: Il intimide souvent les nouveaux au club.
translations.ipa: /il ɛ̃timid suvɑ̃ le nuvo o klœb/
translations.en: He often intimidates the newcomers at the club.
translations.es: A menudo intimida a los nuevos en el club.
translations.de: Er schüchtert die Neulinge im Club oft ein.
translations.it: Intimorisce spesso i nuovi arrivati al club.
translations.ko: 그는 클럽에서 신입들을 자주 주눅 들게 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他经常在俱乐部恐吓新来的成员。
translations.yue: 佢成日喺會所度嚇窒啲新嚟嘅人。
translations.ru: Он часто запугивает новичков в клубе.
translations.pt: Ele costuma intimidar os novatos no clube.
translations.he: הוא לעיתים קרובות מפחיד את החדשים במועדון.
translations.tr: Kulüpte yeni gelenleri sık sık sindirir.
translations.vi: Anh ấy thường khiến người mới ở câu lạc bộ sợ hãi.
translations.ar: هو غالبًا ما يرهب الوافدين الجدد في النادي.
translations.nl: Hij intimideert vaak de nieuwkomers in de club.
translations.uk: Він часто залякує новачків у клубі.
translations.hi: वह अक्सर क्लब में नए लोगों को डराता है.
translations.pl: On często zastrasza nowicjuszy w klubie.
translations.el: Συχνά εκφοβίζει τους νεοφερμένους στο κλαμπ.
translations.nb: Han skremmer ofte nykommerne i klubben.
translations.id: Dia sering mengintimidasi para pendatang baru di klub.
translations.sv: Han skrämmer ofta nykomlingarna i klubben.
translations.ro: Îi intimidează adesea pe noii veniți la club.
translations.da: Han skræmmer ofte de nye i klubben.
translations.ja: 彼はクラブで新入りをよく威圧する。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular subject pronoun.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes 'les nouveaux' as object.
Adverb of frequency modifying the verb.
Definite article, plural; introduces 'nouveaux'.
Adjective, plural masculine, used substantively to mean 'new members'.
Preposition 'à' contracted with 'le' to 'au'; introduces location 'club'.
Common noun; object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Ça m’intimide de parler en public.

translations.fr: Ça m’intimide de parler en public.
translations.de: Öffentlich zu sprechen macht mir Angst.
translations.ko: 대중 앞에서 말하는 건 나를 위축시킨다.
translations.zh-Hans: 在公众面前发言让我感到害怕。
translations.yue: 喺公眾面前講嘢令我怯場。
translations.vi: Nói trước công chúng khiến tôi sợ.
translations.nl: Spreken in het openbaar maakt me bang.
translations.hi: सबके सामने बोलना मुझे डराता है.
translations.el: Το να μιλάω δημόσια με τρομάζει.
translations.nb: Å snakke foran folk skremmer meg.
translations.id: Berbicara di depan umum membuat saya takut.
translations.sv: Att prata inför folk skrämmer mig.
translations.ja: 人前で話すのは怖いです。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as subject.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; clitic object pronoun 'm’' (lemma 'me') attached before the verb.
Subordinating conjunction introducing an infinitival clause ('de parler').
Verb in infinitive; complement of 'intimide' via 'de'.
Preposition introducing the locative phrase.
Noun; complement of the preposition 'en'.

sentences.target: N’essayez pas d’intimider les plus jeunes.

translations.fr: N’essayez pas d’intimider les plus jeunes.
translations.en: Don’t try to intimidate the younger ones.
translations.es: No intenten intimidar a los más jóvenes.
translations.it: Non cercate di intimidire i più giovani.
translations.ko: 더 어린 아이들을 주눅 들게 하려고 하지 마세요.
translations.zh-Hans: 不要试图恐吓年纪更小的人。
translations.yue: 唔好試圖嚇窒啲年紀更細嘅人。
translations.pt: Não tentem intimidar os mais novos.
translations.he: אל תנסו להפחיד את הצעירים יותר.
translations.vi: Đừng cố đe dọa những người trẻ hơn.
translations.nl: Probeer de jongeren niet te intimideren.
translations.hi: कम उम्र वालों को डराने की कोशिश मत करो.
translations.el: Μην προσπαθείτε να εκφοβίσετε τους νεότερους.
translations.nb: Ikke prøv å skremme de yngre.
translations.id: Jangan mencoba menakut-nakuti yang lebih muda.
translations.ro: Nu încercați să-i intimidați pe cei mai tineri.
translations.da: Forsøg ikke at skræmme de yngre.
translations.ja: 年下の子たちを怖がらせようとしないでください。

tokens.explanation: Verb, imperative, 2nd person plural; negative particle 'ne' elided as 'N’' attached before.
Negation adverb; completes 'ne … pas' negation.
Infinitive verb; preposition 'de' contracted to 'd’' before vowel.
Definite article, plural; introduces 'plus jeunes'.
Adverb marking comparative/superlative degree with the adjective 'jeunes'.
Adjective, plural; used substantively to mean 'the younger ones'.

sentences.target: Ils intimident mon petit frère à l’école.
sentences.reading: /il zɛ̃timid mɔ̃ pəti fʁɛʁ a lekɔl/

translations.fr: Ils intimident mon petit frère à l’école.
translations.ipa: /il zɛ̃timid mɔ̃ pəti fʁɛʁ a lekɔl/
translations.en: They intimidate my little brother at school.
translations.es: Intimidan a mi hermano pequeño en la escuela.
translations.de: Sie schüchtern meinen kleinen Bruder in der Schule ein.
translations.ko: 그들은 학교에서 내 남동생을 주눅 들게 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在学校恐吓我的弟弟。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺學校度嚇窒我細佬。
translations.ru: Они запугивают моего младшего брата в школе.
translations.pt: Eles intimidam meu irmão mais novo na escola.
translations.he: הם מפחידים את אחי הקטן בבית הספר.
translations.vi: Họ làm em trai tôi sợ hãi ở trường.
translations.ar: هم يرهبون أخي الصغير في المدرسة.
translations.nl: Ze intimideren mijn kleine broer op school.
translations.uk: Вони залякують мого молодшого брата в школі.
translations.hi: वे स्कूल में मेरे छोटे भाई को डराते हैं.
translations.pl: Oni zastraszają mojego młodszego brata w szkole.
translations.el: Εκφοβίζουν τον μικρό μου αδελφό στο σχολείο.
translations.nb: De skremmer lillebroren min på skolen.
translations.id: Mereka mengintimidasi adik laki-laki saya di sekolah.
translations.sv: De skrämmer min lillebror i skolan.
translations.ro: Îl intimidează pe fratele meu mai mic la școală.
translations.cs: Ve škole zastrašují mého mladšího bratra.
translations.da: De skræmmer min lillebror i skolen.
translations.ja: 彼らは学校で弟を威圧している。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Possessive determiner, singular; modifies 'frère'.
Adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'frère'.
Common noun; direct object.
Preposition; introduces the location phrase.
Noun with elided definite article 'l’' attached; object of the preposition.
